LAW AND MOTION 301, PLAINTIFF LASALLE BANK NATIONAL ASSOCIATION'S MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT/SUMMARY ADJUDCIATION. MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT IS GRANTED AS TO DEFENDANT ROJAS. IF THERE ARE TENANTS AS TO WHOM THE NECESSARY NOTICE UNDER 1161A(C) HAS NOT BEEN GIVEN, IT IS UP TO THEM TO ASSERT WHATEVER RIGHTS THEY MAY HAVE. ORDER AND JUDGMENT WERE SIGNED IN OPEN COURT. JUDGE: PETER J. BUSCH, REPORTER: CAROL KAREN, CSR# 8189
ORDER GRANTING MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT

THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF LASALLE BANK NATIONAL ASSOCIATION AS TRUSTEE RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT ROJAS, WILFREDO THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: 262 EDINBURGH STREET, SAN FRANCISCO, CA 94112, SEE SCANNED DOC

CLAIM OF RIGHT TO POSSESSION AND NOTICE OF HEARING, PROOF OF SERVICE FILED BY DEFENDANT VELASQUEZ LAINEZ, LESLY CAROLINA HEARING SET FOR MAY-13-2008 AT 09:30 AM IN DEPT 301

LAW AND MOTION 301, THE DEFENDANT WAS SWORN AND EXAMINED BY THE PLAINTIFF'S COUNSEL. AFTER HEARING THE ARGUMENT AND THE EVIDENCE PRESENTED, THE COURT ORDERED THAT DEFENDANT LESLY VELASQUEZ LAINEZ' CLAIM OF RIGHT TO POSSESSION IS GRANTED. THE EXISTING EVICTION NOTICE DID NOT SERVE THE DEFENDANT PROPERLY. MR. COHEN IS TO PREPARE THE ORDER. JUDGE: PETER J. BUSCH, REPORTER: CAROL KAREN, CSR# 8189
RETURN OF EXECUTION FOR POSSESSION OF REAL PROPERTY ISSUED TO SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY, RETURNED AND FILED, UNSATISFIED AS TO DEFENDANT ROJAS, WILFREDO
MINI-MINUTES FOR MAY-13-2008 9:30 AM FOR DEPT 301

calendar.matters:
Claim Of Right To Possession And Notice Of Hearing
Off Calendar May-13-2008 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:

APPEARANCES: ATTY. ROBERT R. COHEN, TEL. 492-2657, APPEARING SPECIALLY FOR THE PLAINTIFF;
DEFENDANT AND MOVING PARTY CAROLINA VELASQUEZ, TEL. 573-9433, APPEARING IN PROPRIA PERSONA, WITH SPANISH INTERPRETER: ALBERTO X. ANDRADE.

RULING: A R G U E D. THE DEFENDANT WAS SWORN IN AND WAS EXAMINED BY THE PLAINTIFF'S COUNSEL. AFTER HEARING THE ARGUMENT AND THE EVIDENCE PRESENTED, THE COURT ORDERED THAT DEFENDANT LESLY VELASQUEZ LAINEZ' Claim Of Right To Possession IS GRANTED. THE EXISTING EVICTION NOTICE DID NOT SERVE THE DEFENDANT PROPERLY. MR. COHEN IS TO PREPARE THE ORDER. Judge: Peter J. Busch, Reporter: Carol Karen, CSR# 8189 =(301/PJB)

MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT
Off Calendar Mar-27-2008 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: APPEARANCES:
ROBERT D. RESNER, ESQ., (415)482-9500, FOR PLAINTIFF/MOVING PARTY LASALLE BANK NATIONAL ASSOCIATION
WILFREDO ROJAS, IN PROPRIA PERSONA, (415)469-7927, DEFENDANT/OPPOSING PARTY

THE MATTER WAS ARGUED. AFTER THE ARGUMENT, THE COURT ADOPTED ITS TENTATIVE RULING AS FOLLOWS: PLAINTIFF LASALLE BANK NATIONAL ASSOCIATION'S MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT/SUMMARY ADJUDCIATION. MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT IS GRANTED AS TO DEFENDANT ROJAS. IF THERE ARE TENANTS AS TO WHOM THE NECESSARY NOTICE UNDER 1161a(c) has not been given, it is up to them to assert whatever rights they may have. ORDER AND JUDGMENT WERE SIGNED IN OPEN COURT. Judge: Peter J. Busch, Reporter: Carol Karen, CSR# 8189 (301/PJB/AL)
